info.description: The Comparable (Comp) Set API allows users to retrieve candidate competitive sets for hypothetical listings.
info.title: Wheelhouse Comp Set API

tags.name: Rate Limit
tags.description: By default, our API is limited to 20 requests / minute.  This can be adjusted so please [reach out to us](mailto:tech-support@usewheelhouse.com) with any questions.

CompSetApiKey.name: X-Integration-Api-Key
CompSetApiKey.description:
All comp set integrations will be given a comp set integration API key. [Contact
us](mailto:tech-support@usewheelhouse.com) with a description of your use-case to get one.

UserApiKey.name: X-User-API-Key
UserApiKey.description:
Requests to the API must be made in a specific User's context. Specifically, the user to whom the
UserApiKey belongs must be the owner of the listing/comp set being queried.

**BOTH API key headers are required** to make Comp Set API calls

distance_meters.description: Distance in meters from the search location.

updated_at.description: Last time the listing data was updated.

amenities.description: Comma-separated list of amenities available at the listing.

anr_365_0.description: Average nightly rate for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

apr_365_0.description: Average price per night for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

available_nights_365_0.description: Number of available nights in the last 365 days.

bathrooms.description: Number of bathrooms, can be a decimal for half baths.

blocked_nights_365_0.description: Number of blocked nights in the last 365 days.

bookable_nights_365_0.description: Number of bookable nights in the last 365 days.

booked_nights_365_0.description: Number of booked nights in the last 365 days.

cleaning_fee.description: Cleaning fee in the specified currency.

currency.description: Currency code for the listing's prices.

guests_included.description: Number of guests included in the base price.

lead_time_365_0.description: Lead time for booking for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

listing_created_at.description: The date and time when the listing was created.

listing_last_updated.description: The last time the listing was updated.

los_365_0.description: Average length of stay for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

market_id.description: Identifier for the market where the listing is located.

nrevenue_365_0.description: Net revenue for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

nrevpar_365_0.description: Net revenue per available room for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

nrevpar_open_365_0.description: Net revenue per available room for open nights in the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

occupancy_365_0.description: Occupancy rate for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

open_occupancy_365_0.description: Occupancy rate for open nights in the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

openness_365_0.description: Openness rate for the last 365 days. Null if not applicable.

openness_90_0.description: Openness rate for the last 90 days. Null if not applicable.

review_count.description: Number of reviews for the listing. Null if no reviews.

room_type.description: Type of room (e.g., house, private room).

sleeps.description: Maximum number of people the listing can accommodate.

star_rating.description: Star rating of the listing. Null if not rated.

thumb_url.description: URL for the thumbnail image of the listing.

status.description: Status of the listing (e.g., active, hidden, review, removed).

get.description: Given the search params, retrieve a list of candidate listings that could be added to a comp set.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.description: Radius in meters to search for candidate listings.

parameters.name: min_bedrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bedrooms in returned listings.

parameters.name: max_bedrooms
parameters.description: Maximum number of bedrooms in returned listings.

parameters.name: min_bathrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bathroomss in returned listings. Includes half-baths as decimals.

parameters.name: max_bathrooms
parameters.description: Maximum number of bathrooms in returned listings. Includes half-baths as decimals.

parameters.name: room_types
parameters.description: Array of room types to include in results. Possible values ['castle', 'apartment', 'camper', 'bus', 'tower', 'bnb', 'island', 'boat', 'hostel', 'houseboat', 'hotel', 'house', 'holiday_home', 'cabin', 'mill', 'other', 'room', 'camping', 'shared']

parameters.name: min_bookable_nights_0_365
parameters.description: Minimum number of bookable nights in the next 365 days.

parameters.name: min_open_occupancy_0_365
parameters.description: Minimum open occupancy in the next 365 days (percentage)

get.summary: Fetch Comp Set candidate details for a specific listing
get.description: Given a listing id in the path, retrieve the listing details.

200.description: Successfully retrieved comp set listing details.

get.summary: Fetch Comp Set candidate details for a set of listings
get.description: Given a listing id in the path, retrieve the listing details.

200.description: Successfully retrieved comp set listing details.
